creator: fuz@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm sorry it took so long for this one to be processed.
Your patch still does not apply correctly as it is against just the port directory, not the ports tree as a whole.  For future patches, please clone the ports tree, apply your changes, make a commit, and then use "git format-patch" to create a patch.  "git format-patch" is not helpful if you do it in a custom repository just comprising one port.
